name: Ramos-Lynch, Michael

JD (Distinction) + MS Management Science & Engineering from Stanford; formerly at DLA Piper and advisor at Innovation Endeavors (VC). No policy-advocacy affiliations surfaced.

name: Castro, Nicole
resolved_employer: Metcalfe Wolff Stuart & Williams, LLP (partner, commercial real estate attorney)
evidence: Nicole Castro, partner at Metcalfe Wolff Stuart & Williams (Austin commercial real estate law firm; employer string matches). JD UT-Austin 2001 cum laude, BBA Finance UT 1994; represents developers, landlords and government agencies in CRE transactions. No lobbyist registration; no federal PAC record.
